sentences.text: The system discovered damping with coefficient 0.25 (confidence: 0.90) based on 8 observations of slide-collision.
The system discovered friction with coefficient 0.25 (confidence: 0.90) based on 8 observations of slide-collision.
The system discovered restitution with coefficient 0.25 (confidence: 0.90) based on 8 observations of slide-collision.
The relationship between concept.friction and concept.restitution follows Composer physical model, where concept.friction modulates concept.restitution.
This concept is analogous to concept.damping in cross-domain because they share harmonic motion properties.
